warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
10 Plate I Y T
10 Scap Pull Ups
10 Cossack Squats
5 Tempo Banded Squats
15 Empty Bar Squats
0530 Specific Warm Up
10 Scap Pull Ups
10 Scap Push Ups
2 mins on Assault Bike
10 DB Good Morning
Move through each DB variation.
2 Wall Walks or Handstand Holds

strength.name: Hang Power Snatch
strength.description:
1x3 | 1x3
E2MOM 12min
Work Up to a Top Set of 3. Increase weight if it is feeling good or dial it in for another set.
00:00 3
02:00 3
04:00 3
06:00 3
08:00 3
10:00 3

strength.name: Back Squat
strength.description:
4x6 | * Elbows to back pocket
* Rib Cage to Pelvis
* Screw feet OUT into the floor | E2MOM 12 mins
BUILD 2 sets
00:00 10 @ 50%
02:00 8 @ 60%
HOLD 4x6
04:00 6 @ 65%
06:00 6 @ 65%
08:00 6 @ 65%
10:00 6 @ 65%

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
EMOM x 3
Min 1: 20/15 Cal Row
Min 2: 20 Dumbell Snatches
MIn 3: 4 Wall Walks
Min 4: Rest
Round 1 Dumbell Snatch
Round 2 DB Hang Clean & Jerk
Round 3 10 x DB Devil Press
@ 22.5/15kg

hypertrophy.reasoning: Today heavily taxes lower body and anterior chain; posterior chain accessory work balances without competing for recovery.

siri_text: Tuesday's workout. Strength: Hang Power Snatch, 1 by 3. Strength: Back Squat, 4 by 6 at 65 percent. Metcon: EMOM. For hypertrophy, focus on back, biceps, rear delts.
